name: Arkansas
description_short: ERROR: arkansas.com is the official Arkansas state tourism website, not a financial services company. It provides travel planning and destination information.
description_long: CRITICAL MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED: arkansas.com is the official tourism and travel website for the State of Arkansas, operated to promote tourism and recreational opportunities across the state. The website's actual purpose is to help visitors plan trips, explore regional attractions, and discover state parks and natural destinations. The website content contains exclusively tourism-related information including regional travel guides, state park information, outdoor recreation opportunities, cultural attractions, and trip planning resources. There are no financial services, lending products, credit offerings, or payday alternative services mentioned anywhere on the website. The website functions as a destination marketing organization (DMO) resource, not as a consumer finance company. arkansas.com should be removed from the CreditDoc finance directory entirely, as it provides no financial products or services of any kind. The miscategorization appears to stem from confusion between "Arkansas" (the state) and an actual financial services company operating within Arkansas.
services: State tourism information and trip planning
Regional destination guides (Ozarks, Delta, Timberlands, Capital, etc.)
pros: Comprehensive state tourism information with detailed regional guides
Free travel planning resources and inspiration for visitors
Extensive information about 52 state parks and outdoor recreation
cons: Not a financial services company — offers zero financial products
No lending, credit, or alternative financial services available
Completely unrelated to consumer finance or credit solutions
No contact information for financial assistance or payday alternatives
Should not be listed in any financial services directory
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: CRITICAL ERROR: arkansas.com is the official Arkansas state tourism website with zero financial services. This listing should be removed from CreditDoc immediately. No consumer should consult this resource for payday alternatives, loans, or any financial products.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: North Arkansas Abstract & Title Co., Inc.
